14 uses

	vendor/golang.org/x/net/dns/dnsmessage (current package)
		message.go#L427: 	bits        uint16

		message.go#L464: 	if h.bits, newOff, err = unpackUint16(msg, newOff); err != nil {
		message.go#L485: 		Response:           (h.bits & headerBitQR) != 0,
		message.go#L486: 		OpCode:             OpCode(h.bits>>11) & 0xF,

		message.go#L488: 		Truncated:          (h.bits & headerBitTC) != 0,
